reviews.comment:
Empleados de playa muy correctos. Los baños cierran de 22 a 08 hs.
El minimercado con cafetería está cerrado (local vacio).

(Translated by Google)
The beach staff were very helpful. The restrooms are closed from 10 PM to 8 AM.
The mini-market with a café is closed (empty).

reviews.comment:
Nos tocó en reparación la parte comercial! Pero son los que tienen. ALFAJORES 20 DE JUNIO!!

(Translated by Google)
We got stuck with the commercial side under repair! But that's what they have. ALFAJORES JUNE 20TH!!

reviews.comment:
Está en refacción. Cargue combustible y como pedí factura A no me dejaron usar la aplicacion de YPF. Me cargaron los puntos manualmente pero no  pude usar los beneficios de la APP. Como siempre  el ACA  tiene un servicio pésimo. Pasa el tiempo y no cambia.

(Translated by Google)
It's under renovation. I filled up with fuel, and since I requested an invoice (type A), they wouldn't let me use the YPF app. They manually added the points, but I couldn't use the app's benefits. As always, ACA's service is terrible. Time passes, and nothing changes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT201dGNraDVNVU5HTFZaVmRYVjFXbEI1ZDJONU4xRRAB
